brand.voice: Professional, approachable, data-driven. Confident without being arrogant.

products_services.name: ProDashboard
products_services.description: All-in-one business analytics and operations platform. Connects all data sources into a single real-time dashboard.
products_services.target_user: Operations managers, COOs, department heads at SMBs

target_audience.primary: SMB operations teams — companies with 50-500 employees
target_audience.secondary: Enterprise IT/ops departments at 500+ employee firms
target_audience.demographics: Decision-makers aged 30-55, tech-comfortable but not engineers
pain_points: Spending too many hours on manual reporting each week
No single source of truth for team performance

competitors.name: Asana
competitors.weakness: No real-time data, no reporting automation

unique_value_proposition: The only operations platform that automatically generates executive-ready reports without any manual work — setup takes under 30 minutes.
content_pillars: Industry insights and operational thought leadership
Product tips, how-tos, and feature spotlights
Customer success stories and ROI case studies

current_projects.name: Q2 Product Launch — ProDashboard AI Edition
current_projects.description: Launch of ProDashboard v3.0 featuring AI-powered anomaly detection and auto-insights

current_projects.name: Content & SEO Overhaul
current_projects.description: Rewrite all website copy and launch a content marketing engine targeting ops personas

notes: Client prefers concise, ROI-focused communication in all external messaging.
Emphasize ease of setup — '30 minutes' is a key selling point.
Avoid over-promising AI capabilities; keep AI messaging grounded in real features.
LinkedIn is the primary acquisition channel — content there is highest priority.
